title: Parnassia pseudoalpicola
taxonomy: Parnassia pseudoalpicola is a species of flowering plant in the genus Parnassia. Parnassia pseudoalpicola belongs to the family Celastraceae. Parnassia pseudoalpicola is native to the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau. The plant is a perennial species with unique white to pinkish flowers. Parnassia pseudoalpicola is an alpine plant species found in high-altitude areas of the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage.
